$comment: One row of the schema-coverage binding table (Harness Contracts v2; docs/harness-contracts-v2.md). Asserts that the structured-artifact schema named in `schema` is bound to at least one validate.sh dispatch arm (`validators`, minItems 1) and is exercised by --check-all against a real canonical file (`canonical_gate` = a filename/dirname token that appears in the --check-all body, or the literal `self-test-only` for a schema with no shipped canonical instance whose validator's own self-test is the ground truth). `closed_keys` (default false) opts the schema into additionalProperties:false enforcement by the shared engine. schema_coverage.py proves disk == this table at --check-all; the table is canonical, no doc re-lists it. additionalProperties:false — a stray key here is a manifest typo.
title: APODICTIC schema-coverage binding (apodictic.schema_binding.v1)
